blended.narrative: Cypress Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 60 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
